security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; style-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://unpkg.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob: https://unpkg.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:27183 ws://localhost:27183

bundle.shortDescription: Companion cockpit for Claude Code: usage, live sessions, and remote control
bundle.longDescription: Claude Conductor is a companion app for Claude Code. It monitors your Claude usage limits from the system tray, hosts a live chat hub for Claude Code sessions across all your projects, relays permission prompts, and adds a remote phone cockpit, voice mode, session history, and channel management for headless automation.
